title: boerhavia repens var. viscosa
intro: Boerhavia repens var. viscosa, also known as the sticky hogweed or black hogweed, is a plant species that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Boerhavia repens var. viscosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
